zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle於1230年出生在英國越可爾巴沙拉爾 伊夫斯時，他的父親Robert de Talbot II25歲，母親Matilda of Yorkshire21歲。他與Mathea of Yorkshire結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1273年在他的家鄉享年43歲。

nameMeanings.name: TALBOT
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Emile, Marcel, Anatole, Armand, Aubert, Camille, Gilles, Normand, Adrien, Alcide, Andre, Auguste.
English and Irish (of Norman origin); French: from the Anglo-Norman French personal name Talebot, a pet form of Old French Talebert, Talbert (see Talbert 1). Compare Talbert 2.
French: from the ancient Germanic personal name Talbald, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + bald ‘bold’.

variants.name: Talbert
meanings: English and Scottish (of Norman origin); French: from the Old French personal name Talebert, Talbert, from ancient Germanic Talaberht or Dalbert, composed of the elements dal ‘bright, proud’ or tal ‘valley’ + berht ‘bright’.
Altered form of English   Talbot  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Talbott
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Talbot  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle was born in 1230, in Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, his father, Robert de Talbot II, was 25 and his mother, Matilda of Yorkshire, was 21. He married Mathea of Yorkshire. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died in 1273, in his hometown, at the age of 43.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle est né en 1230, à Bashall Eaves, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Robert de Talbot II, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Matilda of Yorkshire, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Mathea of Yorkshire. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé en 1273, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 43 ans.

Er hat Mathea of Yorkshire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb 1273 im Alter von 43 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle è nato il nel 1230 nel Bashall Eaves, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, Robert de Talbot II, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Matilda of Yorkshire, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Mathea of Yorkshire. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli. Morì nel 1273, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 43 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castleが1230年にイギリスヨークシュアイアバシャル エエイベスで生まれた時，父Robert de Talbot IIは25歳，母Matilda of Yorkshireは21歳であった。Mathea of Yorkshireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子の親であった。彼は1273年に故郷で43歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle(이)가 1230년 영국 요르크실르 배샤 이브스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Talbot II(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Matilda of Yorkshire(은)는 21세였다. 그는 Mathea of Yorkshire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1273년 그의 고향에서 43세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas I TALBOT of Bashall Eaves, Gov of Clitheroe Castle родился в 1230 г. в местности башолл эавесь, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Robert de Talbot II было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Matilda of Yorkshire, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Mathea of Yorkshire. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер в 1273 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 43 лет.
